action.reasoning: Observation: Best bal_acc=0.5853 (val=0.571) from iter11's 2-stage ResNet50 (Focal+AdamW5e-4+sqrt-sampler 60ep s1, CE+SGD lr=0.05 mom=0.9+count-sampler 30ep s2 on frozen head only) + tau=0.75 logit adj in predict (few_shot=0.358, many/medium stable ~0.78/0.60). iter12 with s1=50/s2=40 + label_smoothing=0.1 in s2 + tau=1.0 + nesterov got lower val=0.539 and bal_acc=0.541 (many dropped to 0.62, few up to 0.429). Curves confirm stage2 lift but overall degradation. Analysis: label_smoothing hurts tail in s2; tau=1.0 over-penalizes head; config drift from best run caused drop. 2-stage cRT + Focal + logit adj is effective for CIFAR100-LT (imbalance=100); ResNet50+RandAug+seeds stable (~5min/iter, 2.26h/18 iters left). Decision: Rewrite clean train.py matching exact iter11 config (no smoothing in s2, s1=60/s2=30, lr_s2=0.05+nesterov, save class_counts+best by val across stages, seeds, log only to metrics.jsonl); set tau=0.75 in predict.py; train then submit_eval immediately (recovers best + minor stabilization for ~0.59 target).
